info.title: Commerce Service
info.description:
Manage all the means that the client use to sell their products, like locations, sales channels, stores and accounts

 **Last update**: 18 feb 26, 04:54 p. m.

id.description: The unique identifier of the item

dateModified.description: The date of the last modification

userCreated.description: The ID of the user who created the item

userModified.description: The ID of the user who last modified the item

locationId.description: The Location ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Location** Entity. See [Location](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Location).

accountId.description: The Account ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Account** Entity. See [Account](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Account).

ecommerceName.description: The Account name in the ecommerce platform

content.description: For specify extra data of the process

name.description: A human friendly name for the geofence

coverage.description:
The area covered by the geofence.
This is represented by a [GeoJSON](https://geojson.org/) MultiPolygon `coordinates`.

You can build a MultiPolygon in a graphic interface using https://geojson.io (use an array of Polygon coordinates).

For more technical information about GeoJSON Polygons and MultiPolygons, see https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc7946#section-3.1.6.

items.description:
A GeoJSON Polygon ring. The last point of the Polygon must be the same as the first one.

For Polygons with more than one of these rings, the first MUST be the exterior ring, and any others MUST be interior rings. The exterior ring bounds the surface, and the interior rings (if present) bound holes within the surface.
The GeoJSON point coordinates. First element is longitude, and second one is latitude.

isDefault.description: Determines if the Company is the default one. Only one Company can be the *default* and must be `active`

FunctionTotals.description: The totals data. It is only available when `calculateTotals` parameter is active

total.description: The total items found in database applied filters

pages.description: The total pages for the filters applied

name.description: A name to recognize the holiday

day.description: The day of the holiday. The format must be YYYY-MM-DD

target.description:
This defines the targets this holiday will have. Targets determine how the fulfillment operation is affected.

At least one target must be set for each holiday so it has some impact in the fulfillment process.

delivery.description:
This target will suspend delivery operation for the store.
Time slots will be instantly locked so clients are not allowed to schedule their orders for this day.

You can narrow the scope of the target by setting the `carrierIds` or `carrierReferenceIds` scopes.

scope.description:
This defines the scope of the holiday, allowing to apply a holiday to certain carriers for example.
If more than one scope is defined, the holiday will apply to the intersection of the scopes.

If this is not sent or it's empty, the holiday will apply to every carrier.

carrierIds.description: The carriers internal IDs to which the holiday applies.

items.description:
The unique internal identifier (`id`) of a [Carrier](#tag/Carrier).

This will only be taken into account if the `delivery` target is set.

carrierReferenceIds.description: The carriers reference IDs to which the holiday applies.

items.description:
The unique reference identifier (`refId`) of a [Carrier](#tag/Carrier).

This will only be taken into account if the `delivery` target is set.

companyId.description:
The location Company's ID
If no `company` is set, the *default* Company will be used.

countryIso3.description: The country in `iso3` format of the location. This refer to the `iso3` field of the **I18N** Entity. See [I18N](/v2/service/i18n#tag/Country).

timezone.description: The timezone's `name` of the location. This refer to the `name` field of the **I18N** Entity. See [I18N](/v2/service/i18n#tag/Timezone).

geofences.description: The IDs of the [Geofences](#tag/Geofence) that contain this location

phoneNumber.description:
Location's phone number.

> The phone number must be in **E.164** format (they must include country and area code. For toll-free numbers, country code must be included). See [E.164](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/E.164).

Some valid phone examples are:

- '+52 (556) 143-5872' # Mexico
- '+541144556677' # Argentina line-phone
- '+5491122334455' # Argentina cell-phone
- '+548001112222' # Argentina toll-free

Warehouse.description:
Warehouses Information for the Location.
For each item a WMS Warehouse will be created. See [Janis WMS Service](/v2/service/wms#tag/Warehouse).

salesChannels.description: A list with Warehouse Sales Channels IDs. This refer to the `id` of the **SalesChannel** Entity. See [SalesChannels](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Sales-Channel).

group.description:
To create a WarehouseGroup you need a name and the id of the Location. The name is this 'group' field, while the id is the id of the newly created location.

For more information: **WarehouseGroup** Entity. See [WarehouseGroup](/v2/service/wms#tag/WarehouseGroup).

tasks.description:
A list with the tasks that warehouses allow. It could be any of the following:
  - **pickProducts**: It will create a Picking Point, see [Janis Picking Service](/v2/service/picking#tag/picking_point).
  - **sellsProducts** it Will create a **Store**, see [Store](/#tag/Store)
  - **allowsInvoices**: The location will be used in **Janis Economy And Finance Service** aka JEF.
  - **shipsOrders**
  - **allowsPickup**
  - **allowsDriveThrough**

limitedToSellers.description: The Sellers to limit the Warehouse usage. This refer to the `id` of the [Sellers](/v2/service/oms#tag/Seller) in OMS Service.

postalCode.description: The postal code of the location

number.description: The street's number of the location

warehousesIds.description: A list of Warehouse IDs. This refer to the `id` of the **Warehouse** Entity. See [Janis WMS Service](/v2/service/wms#tag/Warehouse).

warehouses.description: A list of Warehouses to create. This refer **Warehouse** Entity. See [Janis WMS Service](/v2/service/wms#tag/Warehouse).
A list of Warehouses to create. This refer **Warehouse** Entity. See [Janis WMS Service](/v2/service/wms#tag/Warehouse).

shortIdentifier.description:
Sales Channel Short identifier.
This field is useful for creating complex ids for entities such as **Order**, **Price**, etc.
***e.g.***
* `OFF-100304`
* `PRE-504219`

currency.description: The Currency `id`. This field refer to **Janis I18N Service**. See [Janis I18N Service](/v2/service/i18n).

currencySymbol.description: The Currency `code`. This field refer to **Janis I18N Service**. See [Janis I18N Service](/v2/service/i18n).

skipPicking.description: The field is deprecated now "externalPicking" must be used instead

externalPicking.description: Indicates that the sales channel does not require picking because the picking process it is done externally

automaticCapturePostPicking.description: Indicates if orders should automatically capture payments after picking

externalDelivery.description: Indicates that the sales channel does not require delivery because the delivery it is done externally

externalPaymentValidation.description: Indicates if the sales channel requires external payment validation

orderRestrictedActions.description:
List of restricted actions for OMS Orders related to this sales channel.
Available actions:
- `reschedule`: Restricts the action to reschedule orders

catalogAccountId.description: Catalog Account ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Account** Entity. See [Account](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Account).

stockAccountId.description: Stock Account ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Account** Entity. See [Account](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Account).

priceAccountId.description: Price Account ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Account** Entity. See [Account](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Account).

ordersAccountId.description: Orders Account ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Account** Entity. See [Account](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Account).

deliveryAccountId.description: Delivery Account ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Account** Entity. See [Account](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Account).

currency.description: The Currency `code`. This field refer to **Janis I18N Service**. See [Janis I18N Service](/v2/service/i18n).

catalogAccountReferenceId.description: Catalog Account ReferenceId. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Account** Entity. See [Account](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Account).

stockAccountReferenceId.description: Stock Account ReferenceId. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Account** Entity. See [Account](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Account).

priceAccountReferenceId.description: Price Account ReferenceId. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Account** Entity. See [Account](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Account).

ordersAccountReferenceId.description: Orders Account ReferenceId. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Account** Entity. See [Account](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Account).

deliveryAccountReferenceId.description: Delivery Account ReferenceId. This refer to the `referenceId` of the **Account** Entity. See [Account](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Account).

hasOrderAccount.description:
In case of sending `false`, this filter returns the **Sales Channels** that do not have an associated order account.
If `true` is sent, it returns the **Sales Channels** that do have an associated account.

StoreFilters.name: filters
StoreFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

SupplierFilters.name: filters
SupplierFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

search.description: This filter will apply to the `name`, `referenceId` and `document` fields

x-janis-total.description: The total amount of records in the list

x-janis-total-created.description: The total amount of items created

x-janis-total-updated.description: The total amount of items updated

x-janis-total-not-modified.description: The total amount of items not modified

x-janis-total-error.description: The total amount of items with error

x-janis-total-removed.description: The total amount of removed items

itemsCreated.description:
Items which were created successfully.
- The *key* of the *object* is the `referenceId` of the created item.
- The *value* of the *object* is the `id` of the created item.

itemsUpdated.description:
Items which were updated successfully.
- The *key* of the *object* is the `referenceId` of the updated item.
- The *value* of the *object* is the `id` of the updated item.

itemsNotModified.description:
Items that did not need to be modified.
This occurs when the item in the service **is equal** to the received item.
- The *key* of the *object* is the `referenceId` of the non modified item.
- The *value* of the *object* is the `id` of the non modified item.

itemsError.description:
Items with some error.
- The *key* of the *object* is the `referenceId` of the item.
- The *value* of the *object* is the validation message error.

post.description: Triggers an import process execution for the account if it is possible. Only available for VTEX import processes

requestBody.description: Name of the import process to trigger

action.description: Action to perform. By default will be 'start'

get.summary: Get an account settings schema by ID

schema.description: An object with the settings-schemas. You can see the schemas available in documentation of each platform or in [platform]-commerce.

requestBody.description: The list of accounts to create or update

get.summary: Get a sales channel by ID

put.summary: Update a sales channel by ID

get.summary: Get a list of sales channels

post.description:
Create or update massive sales-channel items. The maximum of sales-channels admitted is `10000`.  
- The field 'accounts' refer to `referenceId` fields.
- The field 'currency' refer to `code` fields.
